← All tools

Bounding Box Picker

Draw a box on the map — or type its edges — and grab it in every format APIs want: CSV, WKT, GeoJSON, Leaflet bounds and Overpass QL. Everything runs in your browser.

    Try:
    Loading map…
    Size—
    Area—
    Center—

    Edges (decimal degrees)

    Every format APIs want

    Share this exact box with the URL — it stores west,south,east,north in the #hash. Place search is the only network call (OpenStreetMap Nominatim) · a max tool
